title: Shin Eva Bingo
wikitext:
[]: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed Jul 08, 2020 11:06 pm Inspired by the Star Wars bingo videos by Jenny Nicholson ( VIII , IX ). I thought it might be fun for people to make and share their own bingo cards for Shin Eva. There are plenty of bingo card generators on the net, so feel free to use whichever. I initially tried to find some plaintext bingo skeleton so that anyone could just copy and paste theirs here using it, but I had no luck. Here's mine. Remember, it's no fun just having things you know are gonna happen, so I tried to get pretty creative with my spaces. If you wanna just share space ideas or give feedback on space ideas too, that's welcome. I'm not sure if I'll still be in Japan by the time Shin Eva releases, but if I am, I'll definitely be willing to checks cards and share if anyone got bingo.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jul 09, 2020 11:10 am I'm definitely open to the idea of Shin Eva bingo, but not with that card. Half of its fields just reek of bad faith and the other half are things that are basically guaranteed to happen

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by intermediateO » Thu Jul 09, 2020 7:40 pm Blockio#895192 wrote: I'm definitely open to the idea of Shin Eva bingo, but not with that card. Half of its fields just reek of bad faith and the other half are things that are basically guaranteed to happen

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Derantor » Thu Jul 09, 2020 7:53 pm intermediateO wrote: Also, I think it's a testament to 3.0's divisiveness that I genuinely have no idea what spaces are "bad faith" or "guaranteed" in your eyes.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jul 09, 2020 8:14 pm Sorry about that initial statement, thate came off a lot more harsh than it was intended. I had some annoying encounters earlier today and drew some less than ideal conclusions from some of the wording. In particular "no more purple Mark.04s", "time travel", "Kaji is dead", "Penpen is acknowledged", "Eva 07, 08, 10-12 not shown", "Maya x Ritsuko confirmed" and especially "Mari gets no backstory" were some "predictions" (losing the term very loosely here) thrown around ad nauseum in some of the most toxic corners of the Eva fanbase that I had the displeasure of and bad idea to stick around in, almost all the time being used in the immediate context of "Rebuild sucks amirite", seeing so many of those at once put me in a bit of a "oh not this shit again" mood As for "basically guaranteed" - "Misato apologizes to Shinji", "army of Rei clones" and "double entry Eva 08" are really the only ones there, was probably seeing ghosts earlier today. That being said, I'm still not that big of a fan of the card; I can't quite put my finger on it, but something about the thing as a whole feels a bit... disjointed. Part of it is closer to the deeplore stuff that Reichu's theory is about, and part of it is the more inconsequential (or rather, less built up to) character interaction stuff; I'd say it would probably be best to split the thing into two, having one focus on the characters and one on the deeplore, so each is more... cohesive as a whole

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Velorex » Thu Jul 09, 2020 8:37 pm >Shin Eva Bingo FINALLY https://bingobaker.com/ Put this pic in the FREE box and delete the text SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by intermediateO » Thu Jul 09, 2020 10:36 pm I didn't know there was any discourse around the purple Mark 04's. That space specifically is based off of what we saw in Avant 01. Personally, I really didn't like the Mark 04's they introduced in it, them clashing heavily with the Mark 04's in 3.0. They previously all had matching color schemes and naming conventions. Then, Avant comes along and throws out both the esthetics and uniform names. To me the cherry on top were the drones, which feel just so "2016" to me. It would be like if one of the characters dabbed. I would be like, "Wait? How did dabbing even start in their world? They don't have TikTok in the post-apocalypse, do they?" Basically, I don't like the Avant Mark 04's, and I hope we get more purple ones or at least an explanation to the sudden discontinuity between the 04's. I'm not holding my breath for it though, and I think it's just as simple as there being an 8 year gap between movies and them changing their direction. Again, my spaces aren't necessarily based on "wants" and "predictions", just stuff that I think would be fun. (I legit may actually print out my card when I go see it.) Most of the stuff I "think" is gonna happen, don't really make fun squares to me anyways. For example, based on the preview at the end of 3.0 and the leaks for Shin, it's pretty much confirmed that Shinji will be going to a Lilin settlement and meeting up with his old junior high friends, so I rather up it by saying that there's gonna be little Toji babies running around. Like, I would laugh my butt off if I was watching the moving, Maya and Ritsuko kiss, and then someone shouts behind me, "Bingo!" I was going for that kinda vibe with my card. I was definitely stuggling for some ideas for spaces towards the end though. Looking forward to seeing other people's ideas. I will probably be swapping my spaces out with some of them.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 10, 2020 12:46 pm I'm probably gonna make a space for some sort of "The Real Impact Were the Friends We Made Along the Way" messaging.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 10, 2020 2:08 pm intermediateO wrote: I don't like the Avant Mark 04's (...) I think it's just as simple as there being an 8 year gap between movies and them changing their direction.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Jul 10, 2020 4:03 pm I don't know how to feel about any theory involving Unit 01 considering we see in Trailer 2 Wundar flying through Final Impact, likely meaning Unit 01 is still being used as the core to run it. They could use something else as the core, but I've always seen Eva 13 as taking over any role Unit 01 might have had in the latter two movies.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jul 10, 2020 4:15 pm If we're making a new bingo sheet, may i recommend the Excelion march appearing be one of the new squares

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 10, 2020 4:18 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I don't know how to feel about any theory involving Unit 01 considering we see in Trailer 2 Wundar flying through Final Impact, likely meaning Unit 01 is still being used as the core to run it. They could use something else as the core, but I've always seen Eva 13 as taking over any role Unit 01 might have had in the latter two movies.

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed Jul 29, 2020 8:50 am Thought of some new spaces. Gray Cassius Never Appears Human v Human Fight Scene (Something more substantial than the Misato and JSSDF shootout. Like, an Asuka/Mari melee fight against some plebs would be bonkers.)

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 14, 2020 5:04 am Here's a ridiculous list I compiled. (I didn't come up with all of the items on my own. Just... a lot of them... ) I might be serious about some of these, but if you don't already know which ones then I won't say. I split them up into subsections just to be easier on the eyes. I would recommend shuffling them around much more before deploying any for Bingo purposes. Pt.1  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 14, 2020 3:03 pm I'm gonna turn these into actual bingo cards some time in the coming days; this will probably be fun

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 14, 2020 9:48 pm You forgot one. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Aug 17, 2020 2:39 pm And another SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 17, 2020 3:51 pm They're supposed to fit into Bingo board squares, you know!

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Aug 17, 2020 11:49 pm Oops, I forgot, but I guess it's because I've only played Bingo like...twice, mebbe? I'll probably edit my post to fit that stuff into a set of bingo squares of some sort...

[]: Re: Shin Eva Bingo             Quote Post by intermediateO » Thu Dec 03, 2020 4:23 am With the recent teaser and the eminent release of the film itself, I'm definitely gonna have to go in and change some spaces. Some new space ideas since after the teaser: More than 2 Wunders Wunder in Space Eva 07 will be MIA Rei Q Dies in the 1st Act Angel Masked Mk. 11 & 12 Asuka Woke Up Way Late I don't think we'll really be getting anymore plot teases until the film is finally out, so I'd love to see anyone else's cards if they make them.
